name: Ministry of Education
notes: Sets education policy; hosts ENIC/NARIC Serbia for academic recognition; oversees scholarships and bilateral agreements.

name: National Entity for Accreditation and Quality Assurance in Higher Education (NEAQA)
notes: Accredits higher-education institutions and programs; publishes QA decisions and registers.

name: ENIC/NARIC Serbia
notes: Handles academic recognition of foreign HE qualifications; standard decision window up to ~60 days after complete filing.

name: Ministry of Interior – Directorate for Foreigners
notes: Issues visas/temporary residence and residence cards for foreigners; student stay decisions usually within 30 days.
